name: Luxfier Alpha Prototype
description: A nascent world where magic stirs and ancient powers awaken. Five factions vie for control while corruption spreads from the Abyss edge.

customMacroEvents.name: The Golden Age Festival
customMacroEvents.description: A celebration of peace and prosperity spreads joy and fortune across the land.

customMacroEvents.name: The Void Incursion
customMacroEvents.description: Reality tears open. The abyss reaches in with hungry tendrils.

historicalLandmarks.name: The Breaking of the First Seal
historicalLandmarks.description: The moment the barrier between the mortal realm and the Aether began to crumble.

historicalLandmarks.name: The Shattered Moon
historicalLandmarks.description: A celestial impact that fractured the primary moon, raining starlight-iron upon the peaks.

epicSoulEvents.name: The First Bloom of Void
epicSoulEvents.description: The first recorded instance of Aether-rot appearing in the Elder Grove.

epicSoulEvents.name: The Alignment of Seven Suns
epicSoulEvents.lore: When the seven stars align, the laws of causality are weakened.

epicSoulEvents.name: The Great Silence
epicSoulEvents.lore: The mana in the air is suddenly replaced by a heavy, dense silence.

epicSoulEvents.name: The Great Iron Purge
epicSoulEvents.description: The Ironsmith Guild's systematic reclamation of all 'tainted' starlight-iron.

epicSoulEvents.name: The Luminara Accord
epicSoulEvents.description: The signing of the common-currency pact between the Five Powers.

legacyEchoTemplates: The stones of [location] still hum with the resonance of [player_name]'s [epic_event] from the First Age.
Whispers of [player_name] and the [epic_event] are still told by the elders of [location].
Even as the world turns, the shadow of [player_name]'s [epic_event] remains etched into the history of this land.

narrativeConclusions.title: The Golden Harmony
narrativeConclusions.description: Reality crystallizes into a perfect, immutable state. The threads of time are woven into a tapestry of eternal peace. The Abyss recedes into myth, and the Five Powers unite under a single starlight sky.

narrativeConclusions.title: The Cycle Continues
narrativeConclusions.description: The world survives, scarred but resilient. History begins to repeat its old patterns, waiting for a new soul to break the loop. The struggle between magic and industry remains, a balanced tension in the heart of Luxfier.

narrativeConclusions.title: The Unravelling
narrativeConclusions.description: The fabric of existence frays beyond repair. Locations dissolve into static, and memories bleed into the void. Only the echoes of your actions remain, drifting in a silent, grey expanse where time once flowed.

causalWeatherRules.name: Mana-Static Surge
causalWeatherRules.narrative: Reality crackles with arcane energy, destabilizing the local threads of time.

causalWeatherRules.name: Ash Storm
causalWeatherRules.narrative: The residue of conflict chokes the land, eroding the world's structural integrity.

causalWeatherRules.name: Aetheric Resonance
causalWeatherRules.narrative: A harmonic calm settles over the region, slowly mending minor temporal fractures.

divergentPaths.description: The Valerius line emerges as saintly guardians of the new era.
Betrayal twists the Valerius blood into a line of spectral seekers.
Too much exposure to the rift has fundamentally altered their essence.

evolutionPaths.narrative: Material hardened by a millennium of paradox exposure.
Mana-soaked quartz that has reached harmonic saturation.
Volcanic glass that has absorbed the silence of the Abyss.

epoch_i_awakening.name: The Era of Awakening
epoch_i_awakening.description: A time of fragile peace and rediscoveries.

transitionRules.description: When Paradox exceeds 70%, the world fractures.

epoch_ii_fracture.name: The Fractured Reality
epoch_ii_fracture.description: The skies are torn and the old laws no longer hold.

transitionRules.description: When Paradox exceeds 85%, reality stabilizes into a new form.

evolutionPaths.narrative: Material hardened by the fracture's paradox exposure.
Mana-soaked quartz resonates with the fractured reality.

divergentPaths.description: The Valerius line emerges as guardians of the new fractured era.
Betrayal and fracture twist the Valerius blood into shadow seekers.
The fracture has fundamentally altered their void-bond essence.

epoch_iii_starlight.name: The Starlight Ascension
epoch_iii_starlight.description: Reality has been reforged into something new. Ancient powers return to the world.

transitionRules.description: The world reaches a narrative apex.

evolutionPaths.narrative: Material that has transcended time itself.

factions.name: Eldritch Seekers
factions.description: Scholars and mages dedicated to uncovering the world's hidden truths.

legacyBenefit.name: Scholarly Insight
legacyBenefit.effect: Permanently reveals one hidden sub-area in each new location discovered in the next era.

factions.name: Luminara Mercantile
factions.description: A powerful trade coalition that controls the currency and markets of the Five Powers.

legacyBenefit.name: Mercantile Influence
legacyBenefit.effect: Increases initial gold by 50 and discounts all market purchases by 10% in the following generation.

factions.name: Ironsmith Guild
factions.description: Masters of the forge who provide the world with weapons and industry.

legacyBenefit.name: Iron Will
legacyBenefit.effect: Grants +5 Physical Resistance and the ability to repair materials once per tick without a forge.

factions.name: Shadow-Stalkers
factions.description: An elusive network of spies and assassins operating from the fringes of society.

factions.name: Abyssal Remnant
factions.description: Those who find beauty and power in the deepening corruption of the world.

locations.name: The Loom Room (Coordinate 0,0,0)
locations.description: A non-geographic space where the threads of all worlds are woven. The statues of those who reached the 10,000-year mark stand in silent judgment.

locations.name: Eldergrove Village
locations.description: A peaceful village nestled in an ancient grove. Home to healers and keepers of lore.

locations.name: Luminara Grand Market
locations.description: A bustling marketplace where the five factions trade in uneasy peace.

locations.name: Thornwood Depths
locations.description: A dense, primordial forest rumored to house ancient creatures.

locations.name: Moonwell Shrine
locations.description: A sacred place where moonlit waters grant visions to the worthy.

locations.name: Forge Summit
locations.description: A mountain peak crowned by the legendary forges of the dwarven clans.

locations.name: Frozen Lake
locations.description: A pristine frozen expanse, revealed only in the depths of winter

locations.name: The Great Iron Bridge
locations.description: A massive bridge spanning the Aether-Canyon, only passable when the spring floods subside and the mechanisms aren't frozen.

locations.name: Ancient Citadel (Sunk Path)
locations.description: A secret entrance to the citadel exposed only when the summer heat recedes the surrounding swamp waters.

npcs.name: Brother Theron
dialogue: Welcome, traveler. I am Brother Theron, healer and keeper of lore.
The Sacred Grove provides for those who respect its ways.
If you seek to aid our village, there is always work to be done.

default: Welcome, traveler. I am Brother Theron, healer and keeper of lore.
The Sacred Grove provides for those who respect its ways.
morning: Good morning, friend. May the new day bring healing and hope.
I see you've risen with the dawn. Blessings upon your path this day.
afternoon: The midday sun brings clarity. How fares your journey?
Afternoon is the height of the Grove's power. A good time for tasks.
evening: As dusk falls, we reflect on the day's trials and triumphs.
Evening brings contemplation. Rest well, and may you find peace.
night: The night is deep. Few venture here at this hour. Are you seeking something?
Moonlight guides the lost. What brings you to the shrine so late?
spring: The seeds of magic are blooming! Can you feel the aether rising in the air?
Spring is a time of renewal. The Elder Grove hasn't looked this vibrant in decades.
summer: The midday sun is harsh. I've been spending more time in the cool depths of the shrine.
Summer heat can agitate the local spirits. Best to move with caution.
autumn: The leaves are turning, and the harvest is nearly ready. A time of gratitude.
Autumn winds bring whispers from the canyon. Listen closely to what they tell.
winter: Wrap up warm, traveler. The frost is deep this year, and the mana flow is sluggish.
Even in the dead of winter, the shrine remains a place of warmth and reflection.
rain: Stay dry, friend! The rains can be treacherous.
Perfect weather for tending the medicinal herbs.
snow: Bitter cold today. I hope you're well-prepared.
Winter reveals the true nature of our resolve.
winter: The season of rest and reflection is upon us.
Many come to the shrine seeking warmth in winter.
quest_completed_herbs-for-the-healer: Thanks again for those herbs. They're already helping the village.
Your gathering effort saved many lives.

socialScars.description: Lost a student to a disease he couldn't cure

greeting.text: Welcome, traveler. I am Brother Theron, healer and keeper of lore.

village-lore.text: Eldergrove has stood for centuries. We are guardians of this sacred place.

branchingOptions.text: I see. Thank you for sharing.

quest-offer.text: We need rare herbs from Thornwood Depths for medicines.

npcs.name: Smitty Ironhammer
dialogue: Ah, another adventurer seeks the forge!
Quality craftsmanship takes time and skill. You got coin?
I got weapons, armor, and custom runic infusions.

default: Ah, another adventurer seeks the forge!
Quality craftsmanship takes time and skill. You got coin?
morning: Aye! Forge fires burn bright at dawn. Time to work!
Fresh mornin' for the anvil. Every strike counts when we're rested.
afternoon: Mid-shift's when the real work happens. Hammer's hot, steel's ready.
Afternoon heat from the forge - perfect conditions for tempering.
evening: Long day at the forge. Soon I'll head to the market before closin'.
As dusk approaches, I finish my finest pieces. Perfectin' the craft.
night: Night falls on the forge. I rest when the fires die down.
Late night work ain't my style - the forge sleeps when I do.

npcs.name: Sergeant Brynn
dialogue: Gate Sergeant, at your service. Keep the peace in Luminara.
No trouble here. We patrol regular-like.
Report any disturbances to the city guard.

default: Gate Sergeant, at your service. Keep the peace in Luminara.
No trouble here. We patrol regular-like.
morning: Morning watch is starting. Merchants are opening their stalls.
Good morning. Keen eye and sharp blade - that's the patrol way.
afternoon: Market's bustling. Guards stay alert during peak hours.
Afternoon crowds mean heightened vigilance. All's well so far.
evening: Evening shift brings different crowds. Fewer merchants, more wanderers.
As dusk falls, we increase patrols. Crime often stirs at night.
night: Night watch - the quiet hours when real trouble brews.
Darkness brings danger. The city sleeps, and we never rest.
spring: Markets are picking up! Spring's the best time for trade.
Keep those coins moving! The spring trade routes are finally open.
summer: It's a hot one on the gate. Keep your tempers in check, people.
Summer heat brings short tempers. I'm keeping a closer eye on the market.
autumn: Autumn harvests are coming in. Busy times for the gate guards.
The market's full of bounty. Let's make sure it doesn't attract the wrong crowd.
winter: Quiet on the gate today. Most people are staying warm by the fire.
Winter patrols are slow, but the cold can be just as dangerous as any thief.

quests.title: Herbs for the Healer
quests.description: Brother Theron needs rare herbs from Thornwood Depths to prepare medicines for the village. Gather the required plants and return safely.

quests.title: Shadows in the Thornwood
quests.description: Corrupted creatures have been spotted deeper in the forest. Investigate the source and report back to Brother Theron.

quests.title: The Forge Awakens
quests.description: Smitty Ironhammer wants to test your crafting potential. Gather iron ore from nearby caverns and forge your first weapon.

quests.title: Midnight Offering
quests.description: Brother Theron requests a sacred offering at the Moonwell Shrine at the stroke of midnight. The ritual is only potent during those hallowed hours.

essenceAltars.name: Moonwell Sacred Altar
essenceAltars.description: A mystical altar thrumming with ancient power. The dual moons are reflected in the crystal waters below. Here, essence can be reshaped.

essenceAltars.name: Thornwood Essence Stone
essenceAltars.description: A weathered stone covered in twisted thorns and glowing runes. Wild magic crackles around it. Morphing here is more dangerous but addictive.

essenceAltars.name: Forge Resonance Anvil
essenceAltars.description: An ancient anvil glowing with forge-fire. It pulses with rhythmic resonance. Dwarven craftsmanship at its finest. Morphing is methodical and controlled here.
